label: Country code
description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country identifier (three-letter code).

label: Year
description: Calendar year of observation.

label: Country name
description: Full English country name from V-Dem.

label: ICT patent share
description: ICT-related patent applications as a share of total triadic patent families.

label: R&D expenditure (% GDP)
description: Gross domestic expenditure on R&D (GERD) as a share of GDP.

label: Business R&D (% GDP)
description: Business enterprise R&D expenditure (BERD) as a share of GDP.

label: Government R&D (% GDP)
description: Government-performed R&D expenditure (GOVERD) as a share of GDP.

label: Higher-education R&D (% GDP)
description: Higher-education-sector R&D expenditure (HERD) as a share of GDP.

label: R&D per capita (USD PPP)
description: Total R&D expenditure per capita in USD at purchasing power parity.

label: Researchers per 1 000 employed
description: Number of full-time-equivalent researchers per 1 000 persons employed.

label: Triadic patent share
description: Country's share of all triadic patent families filed with the IP5 offices.

label: Triadic patent families
description: Count of triadic patent families (filed with EPO + JPO + USPTO) attributed to the country.

label: AI triadic patent families
description: Triadic patent families using OECD's official AI patent definition (CPC classification + text mining). Covers IP5 patent offices.

label: AI patent applications (WIPO PCT)
description: AI patent applications filed through WIPO's Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) channel using the OECD AI patent definition.

label: HH internet access (%)
description: Percentage of households with internet access at home.

label: HH broadband access (%)
description: Percentage of households with broadband internet access.

label: HH fixed broadband (%)
description: Percentage of households with a fixed broadband connection.

label: HH mobile broadband (%)
description: Percentage of households with mobile broadband internet access.

label: HH computer access (%)
description: Percentage of households that own or have access to a computer.

label: ICT business R&D (USD PPP mn)
description: Business enterprise R&D expenditure in ICT-intensive industries summed across NACE Rev.2 sectors. Millions of USD at PPP.

label: GDP per capita (const. 2015 USD)
description: GDP per capita in constant 2015 US dollars.

label: GDP growth (annual %)
description: Annual percentage growth rate of GDP at market prices (constant local currency).

label: GDP (current USD)
description: Gross domestic product in current US dollars.

label: Trade openness (% GDP)
description: Sum of exports and imports of goods and services as a share of GDP.

label: Gross capital formation (% GDP)
description: Gross capital formation (fixed capital + inventories) as a share of GDP.

label: Inflation (CPI %)
description: Annual change in the consumer price index.

label: Unemployment rate (%)
description: Share of the labour force that is unemployed but seeking work.

label: Population
description: Total population.

label: Internet users (% population)
description: Individuals who used the internet in the last three months.

label: Mobile subscriptions per 100
description: Active mobile-cellular telephone subscriptions per 100 people.

label: Fixed broadband per 100
description: Fixed broadband internet subscriptions per 100 people.

label: Tertiary enrolment (gross %)
description: Gross enrolment ratio in tertiary education regardless of age.

label: Education expenditure (% GDP)
description: Government expenditure on education as a share of GDP.

label: WGI: Control of corruption
description: Perceptions of the extent to which public power is exercised for private gain. Ranges roughly −2.5 (worst) to +2.5 (best).

label: WGI: Government effectiveness
description: Perceptions of the quality of public services and the civil service. Ranges roughly −2.5 to +2.5.

label: WGI: Regulatory quality
description: Perceptions of the government's ability to formulate and implement sound policies. Ranges roughly −2.5 to +2.5.

label: WGI: Rule of law
description: Perceptions of the extent to which agents have confidence in the rules of society. Ranges roughly −2.5 to +2.5.

label: WGI: Voice and accountability
description: Perceptions of the extent to which citizens can participate in government selection and freedom of expression. Ranges roughly −2.5 to +2.5.

label: WGI: Political stability
description: Perceptions of the likelihood of political instability or politically-motivated violence. Ranges roughly −2.5 to +2.5.

label: IMF GDP (current USD bn)
description: Gross domestic product in current US dollars. Source: IMF World Economic Outlook.

label: IMF GDP per capita (current USD)
description: GDP per capita in current US dollars. Source: IMF World Economic Outlook.

label: IMF real GDP growth (%)
description: Annual percentage change in real (constant prices) GDP. Source: IMF WEO.

label: IMF inflation average (%)
description: Average consumer price inflation rate. Source: IMF WEO.

label: IMF unemployment rate (%)
description: Unemployment rate as a share of the total labour force. Source: IMF WEO.

label: Current account balance (% GDP)
description: Current account balance as a share of GDP. Source: IMF WEO.

label: Net lending / borrowing (% GDP)
description: General government net lending (+) or borrowing (−) as a share of GDP. Source: IMF WEO.

label: Gross government debt (% GDP)
description: General government gross debt as a share of GDP. Source: IMF WEO.

label: V-Dem: Liberal democracy index
description: Extent to which liberal democratic ideals are achieved. Combines electoral democracy with individual and minority rights protections. Scale 0–1.

label: V-Dem: Electoral democracy index
description: Extent to which the ideal of electoral democracy is achieved. Scale 0–1.

label: V-Dem: Civil liberties index
description: Extent to which civil liberties are respected. Scale 0–1.

label: V-Dem: Rule of law index
description: Extent to which laws are transparently and equally enforced. Scale 0–1.

label: V-Dem: Political corruption index
description: Extent of political corruption across all government branches. Scale 0–1 (higher = more corrupt).

label: V-Dem: Clean elections index
description: Extent to which elections are free and fair. Scale 0–1.

label: V-Dem: Freedom of expression index
description: Extent to which freedom of expression and alternative sources of information are protected. Scale 0–1.

label: V-Dem: Accountability index
description: Extent to which political leaders are held accountable between elections. Scale 0–1.

label: V-Dem: Participatory democracy index
description: Extent to which the ideal of participatory democracy is achieved. Scale 0–1.

label: V-Dem: Egalitarian democracy index
description: Extent to which the ideal of egalitarian democracy is achieved. Scale 0–1.

label: V-Dem: Party nationalization
description: Degree to which political parties campaign and receive votes uniformly across the country. Scale 0–1.

label: V-Dem: Presidentialism index
description: Relative power of the president versus the legislature. Higher values indicate stronger presidentialism. Scale 0–1.

label: AI publications
description: Number of scientific papers classified under the Artificial Intelligence concept in OpenAlex (concept ID C154945302). Counts papers with at least one author affiliated with an institution in the country.

label: ML publications
description: Number of scientific papers classified under the Machine Learning concept in OpenAlex (concept ID C119857082). Counts papers with at least one author affiliated with an institution in the country.

label: Top500 systems (count)
description: Number of supercomputer systems from the country appearing in the Top500 biannual list (maximum of June and November lists for the year).

label: Top500 total Rmax (PFlop/s)
description: Sum of measured peak performance (Rmax) across all country systems in the Top500 list. In petaflops per second (PFlop/s). Annual maximum across June and November lists.

label: Top500 top-system Rmax (PFlop/s)
description: Rmax of the single highest-ranked system from the country in the Top500 list. In petaflops per second (PFlop/s). Annual maximum across June and November lists.

label: AI models released
description: Number of AI models with at least one organisation from the country listed as a creator in the Epoch AI database. Multi-organisation models are attributed to each contributing country.

label: Large AI models released
description: Number of AI models with parameter count ≥ 1 billion attributed to the country. Proxy for compute-intensive frontier-class models.

label: AI patent intensity
description: Ratio of AI triadic patent families to total R&D expenditure as a share of GDP. Measures patenting productivity per unit of R&D input.
unit: AI triadic patent families per % of GDP

label: Log GDP per capita (const. 2015 USD)
description: Natural logarithm of GDP per capita in constant 2015 US dollars.

label: Internet access gap (%)
description: Share of the population without internet access (100 minus internet users %). Higher values indicate a larger digital divide.

label: OECD member
description: Binary indicator equal to 1 if the country is a current member of the OECD and 0 otherwise.
